examples: He began to talk in his most gentle and avuncular manner.
He was now playing the role of disinterested host and avuncular mentor.
The secret police have several functions, my dear, he began in an avuncular tone.
Gates instantly took to his avuncular role in the discussion while sipping a Diet Coke.
Public-safety campaigners lament the loss of the avuncular bus conductor, surplus to requirements on modern vehicles.
